name: Great Ghost Pumpkin Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Combine flour, oats, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt in a bowl; set aside.
3. Cream butter until light and fluffy. Gradually add brown sugar, then granulated sugar, beating well after each addition.
4. Add egg and vanilla; mix until combined.
5. Alternate additions of dry ingredients and pumpkin, mixing well after each addition.
6. Stir in chocolate morsels.
7. For each cookie, drop 1/4 cup dough onto a lightly greased baking sheet. Spread the dough into a ghost shape using a thin metal spatula.
8. Alternatively, make a quick ghost pattern on heavy paper.
9. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until cookies are firm and lightly browned.
10. Remove from baking sheets; cool on wire racks.
11. Spread with white royal icing. Trim the brown face features with piping icing.
